title: Bonney and Luffy Strike Back
description: On pages 12–14, this part focuses on Nami, Unknown person #10, Luffy, Unknown person #11, Marines, Unknown person #12 as The Straw Hats, Bonney, the giants, and the Vegapunk broadcast push Egghead toward its escape point while the world learns that the One Piece will decide the fate of the era.
scene: The Straw Hats, Bonney, the giants, and the Vegapunk broadcast push Egghead toward its escape point while the world learns that the One Piece will decide the fate of the era.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: My treasure? It's yours to find.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Everything is right where I left it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Ray-san, you'll catch a cold!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: ALL RIGHT, VEGAPUNK!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I like where this is going!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Isn't the commodore back yet?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I can't wait much longer!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Unfortunately, there's no guarantee that it will be found by someone joyboy would want.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Emperor Blackbeard's Lair Pirate Island: HachinOSU

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Boss!! You're drinking too much!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Shadup!! I ain't drinkin'!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Emperor red-haired shanks ship THE RED FORCE

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Chairman Buggy!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: There's no doubting your greatness now!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: You always exceed our expectations!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Emperor Buggy's base emptee Bluffs Island

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's so much more to your dream than I thought!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: There's no way we'll just stand by!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: Navy headquarters

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Let's go and find it first!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Who'll protect the common folk then?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: You dolts!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: There's no stopping this now...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The fate of this world will be decided...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: ...by whoever finds it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: It all depends on who finds...

dialogue.speaker: Vegapunk
dialogue.text: ...The one piece!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: A battle for supremacy!

summary: This part advances the Egghead Escape through 28 cleaned dialogue beats, emphasizing the core conflict, character stakes, and transition into the next movement of the story.
